$comment: Auth config TEMPLATE for auth-aware auditing. Copy to <project>-auth.json, fill in TEST-account credentials, and pass with --auth <path>. config/*-auth.json is already gitignored — keep it that way, it holds credentials. Agents 1 & 5 log in (in a real browser, same context) before driving any route that matches a role's routePatterns, so gated pages are audited as a real authenticated user instead of a redirect to the public landing page. --auth implies --real-env (the app must reach its real auth backend) and --read-only (no destructive clicks). Use dedicated throwaway TEST accounts, never real user accounts.
